name: set_zone_temperature_override
description: Set a temporary temperature override (manual control) for a specific zone. Allows changing the heating/cooling power and target temperature, bypassing the zone's schedule. The override can be configured to persist until the next scheduled time block or be manually cleared.

duration_seconds.description: Duration in seconds for TIMER termination type (optional, only used when termination_type is TIMER)

home_id.description: The ID of the home containing the zone

is_boost.description: Whether this is a boost override (optional, defaults to false)

power.description: Whether to turn heating/cooling ON or OFF for this zone

temperature_celsius.description: The target temperature in Celsius for the override

termination_type.description: How the override should terminate: NEXT_TIME_BLOCK (until scheduled change), MANUAL (user must clear), or TIMER (with duration)

type.description: The type of control: HEATING or COOLING

zone_id.description: The ID of the zone (room) to set the temperature override for
